The '''''Mandjur''''' was a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]].

==History==
The ''Mandjur'' participated in the [[Battle of N'zoth]] as an escort for the task force [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Ballarat]]''.

After the ''Ballarat'' took severe damage from [[Yevetha]]n [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], the ''Mandjur'' was commanded to cover the withdrawal of the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]]. However, the ''Mandjur'' was heavily damaged before it could even launch half of its interceptors, and lost all of its engines and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] within a few Yevethan barrages.

[[Second Lieutenant/Legends|Second Lieutenant]] [[Plat Mallar]] was the pilot of a [[fleet shuttle]] that was ordered to recover the wounded and the killed pilots of the ''Mandjur''. Sensing the fragility of the Republic's position, Mallar took the personal [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] of his incapacitated commanding officer, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tegett]], and entered the fray. He engaged multiple waves of [[D-type fighter|Yevethan fighters]] before one went on a suicide run on the heavily damaged ''Mandjur''. Mallar eventually rammed a trifoil fighter with his X-wing, [[Death/Legends|killing himself]] and the Yevethan [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], but saving the ''Mandjur''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
